Selected Work

3 campaigns

ABM Sales Play #3: Klaviyo Switcher & DSB Paid Social

Paid Media Jan–Feb 2026
Intuit Mailchimp · FY26 Q2
1 The Brief

Mailchimp needed to convert high-value Shopify merchants ($750+ MRR) away from Klaviyo. The January launch required a phased creative approach — optimizing existing ecommerce assets first, then delivering Klaviyo switcher-specific ads aligned to an updated messaging hierarchy built on customer testimonials and competitive differentiators.

2 Strategy

I developed a full-funnel paid social creative brief across Meta and LinkedIn in Attract and Engage stages. Two parallel message tracks: DSB ecommerce social proof (Shopify integration, automation ROI) and Klaviyo switcher conquest messaging ("Break Up With Klaviyo," 42% cost savings). LinkedIn used personalization macros for account-level relevance; Meta led with testimonial-anchored static and carousel formats.

3 Outcome

Phased asset delivery hit the January 14 launch on schedule. The creative framework became a repeatable switcher playbook — modular, testimonial-led assets with reusable copy — carried into Q3 planning. 22 total assets and 64+ copy lines delivered across two channels.

22Assets delivered
2 tracksDSB + Klaviyo
Meta + LIChannels
On time1/14 launch
My role: Creative brief strategy · Messaging architecture · Copy development · Channel spec planning

Agentforce Global Launch: Integrated Demand Generation

Go-to-Market 2024–2025
Salesforce · Global Campaigns
1 The Brief

Salesforce was launching Agentforce — its flagship AI product — and needed to generate immediate, Sales-prioritized pipeline across three international theaters simultaneously: EMEA, LATAM, and APAC. The program had to move fast, localize effectively, and connect marketing activity directly to Sales pipeline rather than awareness alone.

2 Strategy

I led globally coordinated integrated demand generation campaigns tailored to each region's Sales priorities — pairing a high-velocity webinar program (9 sessions/month) with regionally adapted paid, nurture, and field components. Served as strategic GTM advisor to regional Sales and Marketing leadership across all three theaters, translating global strategy into locally executable, revenue-aligned programs with consistent pipeline tracking.

3 Outcome

Generated 8-figure incremental pipeline in the first six months of launch. Campaign frameworks I built were adopted across regions as repeatable playbooks, standardizing best practices and reducing time-to-market for subsequent launches. The broader demand program contributed 9-figure pipeline over the full engagement.

8-figurePipeline · 6 months
3 regionsEMEA · LATAM · APAC
9/moWebinar cadence
9-figureProgram total
My role: Global GTM strategy · Regional campaign adaptation · Sales partnership · Webinar program leadership

DTC 2026: The New Rules of Growth — Expert Webinar Series

Event-Led Demand Gen Mar 2026
Intuit Mailchimp · B2B Marketing
1 The Brief

Mailchimp was absent from the ecommerce expert conversation — Klaviyo dominated mindshare with DTC operators. The brief was to reinsert Mailchimp into that conversation through a high-credibility, external expert-led event targeting mid-market DTC prospects and customers. Success meant building pipeline: stretch registration goal was 1,000 with a 50% MQL target.

2 Strategy

I designed and executed a virtual roundtable featuring 7 DTC operators and investors — including Nik Sharma and Rabah Rahil — with 400K+ combined follower reach and $500M+ in DTC revenue managed. Promotion ran across 3 prospect email sends, 1:1 sales outreach sequences, organic social, and panelist networks. Built as a durable on-demand asset seeding into nurture flows, YouTube, and quarterly newsletters post-event.

3 Outcome

Exceeded the stretch goal: 1,210 registrants, 410 live attendees. 1 in 4 live attendees became a sales-qualified lead — 118 leads routed to sales, 114 net new. 624 paid accounts attended (51% of registrants), validating ICP targeting. 264 free-to-paid upgrade targets entered the nurture pipeline.

1,210Registrants
118Leads to sales
23%Attendee → SQL
51%Paid accts in audience
My role: Program strategy · Speaker sourcing & management · Email promotion · Post-event lead routing
